title: Accessibility Compliance Contract
description: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility requirements for all components and pages

keyboard_navigation.description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible

tab_order.description: Elements focusable via Tab key in logical order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom)

focus_indicator.description: Visible focus ring when tabbed to (min 2px, color contrast ≥3:1)

escape_key.description: Modals and popovers close on Escape key

enter_key.description: Buttons and links activate on Enter key

arrow_keys.description: Menu items, radio groups, and tabs navigate with Arrow keys

screen_reader.description: Content accessible to screen readers (NVDA, VoiceOver, JAWS)

aria_labels.description: Form fields have <label> or aria-label; buttons have text or aria-label

aria_describedby.description: Error messages linked to form fields via aria-describedby

aria_live.description: Dynamic content updates announced via aria-live='polite' (e.g., success messages)

aria_hidden.description: Decorative icons and visual-only elements marked aria-hidden='true'

color_contrast.description: Text color contrast must meet WCAG AA standards

large_text.description: Large text (≥18px bold or ≥24px normal): contrast ratio ≥3:1

graphics.description: Icons and graphical elements: contrast ratio ≥3:1

touch_targets.description: Interactive elements must be large enough for touch

spacing.description: At least 8px gap between adjacent touch targets

color_not_sole.description: Color must not be the only way to convey information

error_fields.description: Error fields marked with text label AND icon/visual indicator

status_indicators.description: Status (success, error, warning) conveyed via color + text/icon

links.description: Links visually distinct from plain text (underline, icon, or bold)

responsive.description: Content and functionality accessible at all viewport sizes

text_sizing.description: Text remains readable at 200% zoom on mobile (no horizontal scroll)

viewport.description: No fixed viewports; responsive design from 320px+ (mobile-first)

success_criteria: Zero critical violations in axe audit
95% of components pass automated accessibility tests
Manual screen reader test confirms all content readable
